object.value: 3D scene representations, radiance fields, point clouds, Gaussian primitives

technology.value: 3D Gaussian Splatting, differentiable rendering, real-time rendering, novel view synthesis

performance.value: rendering quality (PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS), rendering speed (FPS), training efficiency, memory footprint

context_field.value: computer vision, computer graphics, novel view synthesis, scene reconstruction, SLAM, dynamic scenes, 4D reconstruction, digital humans, autonomous driving

notes: 3DGS 由 Kerbl et al. (SIGGRAPH 2023) 提出，是快速发展的新兴领域。评估覆盖 2023 年至今的全部衍生工作。
